commitResults.messageBody: docs: Add project portfolio page

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: Fix note clear-oldest prefix from c/ to co/ in UG
commitResults.messageBody:
The note 'Remove first N notes' command uses the co/ prefix
(PREFIX_CLEAR_OLDEST) but the UG and notes page documented it as c/.
This fixes the inconsistency between UG and the help window.

Fixes #373

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: Add lc/ prefix to find command documentation
commitResults.messageBody:
The find command parser supports lc/ (last contacted) filtering
but this was not documented in the find-contacts page or the
help window MESSAGE_USAGE.

Fixes #374

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: Add lc/ to find command summary table
commitResults.messageBody:
The find command supports lc/ (last contacted) filtering but
the command summary table at the end of the UG omitted it.

Fixes #340

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: Add command format for find and sort in UG
commitResults.messageBody:
The add and edit sections include explicit Format lines but
find and sort did not. Added the Format lines for consistency.

Fixes #372

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: Fix singular/plural in UC5 and UC6
commitResults.messageBody:
The headers use 'criterion' (singular) but the MSS steps used
'criteria' (plural). Changed MSS to use 'criterion' consistently.

Fixes #350

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: Document limitations of similar-name detection
commitResults.messageBody:
Added a note clarifying that similar contact detection uses
exact matching only. Names like 'John Doe' and 'John Doe Sr.'
are not detected as similar.

Fixes #354
docs: Fix note clear-oldest prefix from c/ to co/
docs: Add lc/ prefix to find command documentation
docs: Add lc/ to find command summary table
docs: Fix singular/plural in UC5 and UC6

commitResults.messageTitle: Include sort criteria in sort command feedback message (#396)
commitResults.messageBody:
* Include sort criteria in sort command feedback message

The sort command previously showed 'Sorted X contacts.' without
specifying the criteria used. Add getDescription() to comparator
hierarchy so the message now shows the criteria, e.g.
'Sorted 11 contacts by name (ascending).'

Fixes #371

* Add tests for getDescription() in comparator hierarchy

Cover the new getDescription() and getSingleDescription() methods
with tests for identity (default order), single field, and
multi-field chained comparators including tag comparators.

commitResults.messageTitle: Clarify phone error message for country code numbers (#397)
commitResults.messageBody:
The error message previously said '5-15 digits long' which did not
distinguish between numbers with and without a country code prefix.
Numbers starting with '+' require 8-15 digits, while others require
5-14 digits. Update the message to clarify both constraints.

Fixes #344
docs: Add command format for find and sort in UG
docs: Document limitations of similar-name detection

commitResults.messageTitle: Document clearing fields via edit command in UG
commitResults.messageBody:
The UG showed 'edit 2 n/Betsy Crower t/' as an example but did not
explain that providing a prefix with no value clears that field.
Add a note explaining this behavior with examples.

Fixes #327

commitResults.messageTitle: Add manual testing instructions for more features in DG
commitResults.messageBody:
The manual testing section only covered deleting contacts, launching,
and saving data. Add test instructions for adding, editing, notes,
finding, and sorting contacts.

Fixes #363
Document clearing fields via empty prefix in edit command
Add manual testing instructions for more features in DG
